codeReview.summary: The fix commit correctly resolves the interactions API issues (23505 -> 409 and PATCH contactId ownership checks) and adds AuthGate non-401 error handling, but two prior blocking items remain unresolved: bulk import result propagation and the missing rendering-focused interaction timeline tests.

issues.description: bulkCreate still discards the bulk-import API response by always returning an empty array (`return []`). This does not satisfy the required "propagate the API response properly so errors surface to the UI" behavior and preserves the false-success risk called out in the prior review when server-side per-item failures occur.

The original blocking issue from contact-detail-enrichment-and-interaction-timeline remains: tests are still explicitly logic-only and do not render InteractionTimeline/contact-detail UI states. The fix commit does not address this requirement.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission planning/scope drift: prior synthesis listed 4 blocking issues, but this fix feature was scoped as "Fix 3 blocking issues" and did not include the interaction timeline rendering-test blocker, leaving a known blocker unresolved.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/validation/api-and-ui/scrutiny/synthesis.json:51 lists missing rendering-focused tests as blocking; mission features entry at C:/Users/josep/.factory/missions/c1a7d1d0-5e9b-443d-ba5f-cdb1acba01d8/features.json:514 scopes this fix as "Fix 3 blocking issues".

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS guidance is stale on typecheck baseline and can mislead workers to expect `npm run check` failure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS says typecheck has 10 pre-existing failures (C:/Users/josep/.factory/missions/c1a7d1d0-5e9b-443d-ba5f-cdb1acba01d8/AGENTS.md:82), while the fix handoff reports `npm run check` exitCode 0 (handoff ...a863f7cd...json line with command `npm run check`).

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill context, commit 8080223 diff, and prior failed reviews. Interactions/API and AuthGate fixes are implemented, but the feature still fails scrutiny because bulkCreate does not propagate the bulk-import response payload and the previously blocking interaction timeline rendering-test gap remains unresolved.
